word: G4104 - πιστόω - pistóō - pis-to'-o - Assure of

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πιστόω

- Transliteration: Pistoo

- Phonetic: pis-to'-o

- Definition:

1. to make faithful, render trustworthy

a. to make firm, establish

2. to be firmly persuaded of

a. to be assured of

- Origin: from G4103

- TDNT entry: 08:54,8

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4103; to assure: - assure of.
